chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1099 of 2023 C. P No. D – 1154 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4575/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 16.08.2023 Syed Asghar Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner in C.P No.D-1099/ of 2023 M/s Javed Ali Buriro and Ather Hussain Abro, Advocates for the petitioner in C.P No.D-1154/2023 Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Ghulam Muhammad Bozdar, SHO Police Station, Kotdiji, SIP Jameel Ahmed on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and ASI Mushtaq Bughti, Investigating Officer Police Station, Kotdiji >>>>>>>...<<<<<<< These are two petitions, filed for quashment of FIRs in counter cases bearing Crime Nos.114 of 2023 under Sections 506/2, 337-A(i), 337-F(i) and 504 PPC and 116 of 2023 under Sections 452, 506/2, 337-A(i), 147, 148 and 504 PPC, registered at Police Station Kotdiji, District Khairpur, respectively. Learned AAG Sindh accompanied by relevant Investigating Officers of the aforesaid crimes submits that in one Crime i.e. 114 of 2023 final challan and in Crime No.116 of 2023 interim challan have been submitted and as soon as copies of the medical certificates are received, the final challan would be submitted. Both counsel when confronted with such development do not press these petitions and submit that they will file relevant application before the trial Court for identical relief. Accordingly, these petitions are dismissed along with listed application(s).

Both counsel when confronted with such development do not press these petitions and submit that they will file relevant application before the trial Court for identical relief. Accordingly, these petitions are dismissed along with listed application(s). Office is directed to place a signed copy of this order in the connected captioned matters. Judge Judge ARBROHI
